ItacAcademyItem.Name: Operosi (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of this academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Rime de gli Academici Operosi fatte nella partenza dell`illustriss. sig. rettore del Coll. Mont`Alto, il signor Bernardo Sala (Bologna: presso gli heredi di Bartol. Cochi, 1621)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
